example.title: Scalar SDK Generation Workflow
example.description: Example of the Scalar SDK generation GitHub Actions workflow for TypeScript.
example.code:
name: Generate SDKs

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'openapi.yaml'

jobs:
  generate-typescript-sdk:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Generate TypeScript SDK
        uses: scalar/sdk-generation-action@v1
        with:
          api-key: ${{ secrets.SCALAR_API_KEY }}
          namespace: my-org/payments-api
          language: typescript
          package-name: payments-client
          output-directory: ./sdk

      - name: Publish SDK to npm
        run: |
          cd sdk
          npm publish
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
notes: Requires a Scalar API key from dashboard.scalar.com/user/api-keys
Supported languages: typescript, python, go, php, java, ruby
